query:
INSERT INTO drillDetails (drillId, skillSet, difficulty, athletes, time, equipment, goal, description, instructions, createdBy, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (
  'stride-separation-drill',
  'Hitting',
  'Easy',
  '1+',
  '10 minutes',
  'Bat',
  'To teach younger hitters how to properly stride, transfer weight, and create upper- and lower-body separation so they can consistently get into a strong, balanced hitting position.',
  '["The hitter starts with their feet together and the knob of the bat at their belly button.", "Stride forward while creating separation with the upper body and freeze in a strong loaded position.", "Coach checks balance, posture, and alignment before resetting.", "Repeat this sequence until the hitter understands the movement.", "Progress to swinging: start the same way—feet together, knob at the belly button—feel the stride, weight transfer, and separation, then swing away.", "Walking variation: stride and separate, freeze, bring the back foot up to the front foot, and continue walking forward while maintaining balance and separation."]',
  'The hitter starts with their feet together and the knob of the bat at their belly button, then strides forward while creating separation with the upper body and freezes in a strong loaded position as the coach checks balance, posture, and alignment before resetting; this sequence is repeated until the hitter understands the movement, after which they progress to swinging by starting the same way—feet together, knob at the belly button, feeling the stride, weight transfer, and separation—then swinging away, and a walking variation can be added where the hitter strides and separates, freezes, brings the back foot up to the front foot, and continues walking forward while maintaining balance and separation.',
  1,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3knp7kHgPS8ePkR.root --database 4gdCHRuKFjrDK3bmH43Eh2 --execute INSERT INTO drillDetails (drillId, skillSet, difficulty, athletes, time, equipment, goal, description, instructions, createdBy, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (
  'stride-separation-drill',
  'Hitting',
  'Easy',
  '1+',
  '10 minutes',
  'Bat',
  'To teach younger hitters how to properly stride, transfer weight, and create upper- and lower-body separation so they can consistently get into a strong, balanced hitting position.',
  '["The hitter starts with their feet together and the knob of the bat at their belly button.", "Stride forward while creating separation with the upper body and freeze in a strong loaded position.", "Coach checks balance, posture, and alignment before resetting.", "Repeat this sequence until the hitter understands the movement.", "Progress to swinging: start the same way—feet together, knob at the belly button—feel the stride, weight transfer, and separation, then swing away.", "Walking variation: stride and separate, freeze, bring the back foot up to the front foot, and continue walking forward while maintaining balance and separation."]',
  'The hitter starts with their feet together and the knob of the bat at their belly button, then strides forward while creating separation with the upper body and freezes in a strong loaded position as the coach checks balance, posture, and alignment before resetting; this sequence is repeated until the hitter understands the movement, after which they progress to swinging by starting the same way—feet together, knob at the belly button, feeling the stride, weight transfer, and separation—then swinging away, and a walking variation can be added where the hitter strides and separates, freezes, brings the back foot up to the front foot, and continues walking forward while maintaining balance and separation.',
  1,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);
